/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -stdlib=libc++ CMakeFiles/compile_map.dir/src/compiler/compile_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compile_map.dir/src/compiler/lightmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compile_map.dir/src/utils/map_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compile_map.dir/src/utils/parameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compile_map.dir/src/physx/collision_data.cpp.o -o bin/compile_map
